results.title: Tesla prices to go up from July due to MITI’s CBU EV rules?
results.description: Tesla Malaysia has managed to keep its vehicle prices unchanged despite the end of the CBU EV tax holiday on 31st December 2025. However, there is growing speculation that the situation could change from 1 July 2026 as the company may have to comply with MITI’s latest requirements for imported EVs despite being part of [...]
